subcodes.first_line: O thou true companion! Thy brother hath utmost satisfaction with thee, and at the Sacred Threshold he doth continually seek assistance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار موافق اخوی نهایت رضایت را از شما دارد و در آستان مقدس دائما طلب عون و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
